title: Simple teleporters
body:
# Simple Teleporters
This mod adds teleporters, that can teleport players to any saved coordinates. They can be then also upgraded to teleport faster, teleport items and more! While making the mod, it was important for us to keep most of the content locked until a late part of the game, so it would make later building and resource collecting easier, while also not interfering with the early game.


## Features
- Teleporters
- 5 different teleporter upgrades
- New blocks
- New recipes
